description_long: This is a modern, twin-engine military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept wings. The aircraft features a pointed nose, a bubble canopy cockpit, and prominent twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. Its wings are low-mounted and swept back, with visible hardpoints for external stores or armaments. The landing gear is deployed, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a nose wheel. The engines are mounted at the rear fuselage, with large exhaust nozzles visible. The overall surface is finished in a light gray color, typical of military camouflage.
description: A sleek, twin-engine military jet with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a bubble canopy cockpit in light gray camouflage.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing twin engine exhausts, swept wings, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the sharp nose, bubble canopy, and wide wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side profile with clear visibility of the swept wings, twin tails, and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept wing configuration with no visible winglets and moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle, retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear unit.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed bubble canopy cockpit, likely multi-seat with prominent canopy framing.
